rotisserie_note: 10 oz only tonight — 16 oz sold out

notes.title: Whole Roasted Branzino
notes.detail: Not available tonight. Suggest Seared Scallops or Atlantic Salmon as alternatives.

notes.title: Ibérico Rack of Pork
notes.detail: Two portions remaining | First come first served | Flag the kitchen before you ring it in

notes.title: Ardbeg Uigeadail
notes.detail: Last bottle sold. Suggest Ardbeg 10 Year or Laphroaig 10 Year for a similar smoky profile.

notes.title: Mushroom Velouté
notes.detail: Chef's addition tonight. Wild mushroom velouté with truffle oil and chive. $16. Available as a starter, limited quantity.

notes.title: Table 12 · 7:30pm · Party of 4
notes.detail: Anniversary dinner. Bottle of Billecart-Salmon Brut on arrival, pre-authorized. Do not mention the occasion unless they bring it up first.

notes.title: Table 6 · 8:00pm · Party of 2
notes.detail: Regular guests. Severe shellfish allergy on one guest — flag for kitchen on every order. They typically order the Rack of Lamb and a Grüner Veltliner.

notes.title: From the Manager
notes.detail: Full house tonight. First turn at 5:30, second at 8:00. Push the Rack of Lamb and the Cheese Board with Sauternes pairing. Graham's 20 Year Tawny has been moving well this week — keep mentioning it at the dessert course.
